# Preview

```{python}
from qiskit import QuantumCircuit
from qiskit_aer.primitives import SamplerV2

# 创建电路
qc = QuantumCircuit(2)

qc.h(0)
qc.cx(0, 1)
qc.measure_all()

# 直接创建 Aer SamplerV2
sampler = SamplerV2(
    default_shots=1024,
    seed=1234,
)

# 运行
result = sampler.run(
    [qc],
    shots=1024,
).result()

# measure_all() 创建的经典寄存器名为 meas, 其他的是c
samples = result[0].data.meas

counts = samples.get_counts()
memory = samples.get_bitstrings()

print(counts)
print(memory[:10])
```
